homePreferUsDescription: We focus on what users care about most: speed, trust, and a clear purchase flow. Instead of complex visual tricks, we prioritize premium look + solid flow.
homePreferUsFooterSummary: Inelity experience: consistent UI, fast pages, strong purchase flow.
homePreferUsPrincipleDescription: We increase the premium feel without breaking cross-page consistency. This creates a more stable structure for both SEO and UX.
homePreferUsReasonFastDescription: Page load, interaction, and purchase flow are performance-focused.
homePreferUsReasonPremiumDescription: A minimal, high-quality, and consistent design language increases trust.
homePreferUsReasonSecureDescription: User flow is clear; critical steps are controlled and trustworthy.
homePreferUsReasonTimeDescription: Unnecessary steps are reduced with automated/optimized delivery logic.
homeTeamDescription: The people building and running the platform.
institutionalCancelPolicyBody: Cancellation and refund processes are managed according to official procedures and conditions focused on customer satisfaction. Please contact support for details.
institutionalCancelTrustBody: Since 2016, Inelity has operated as a recognized and reliable software marketplace. Customer satisfaction is our priority, with transparency, honesty, and security in every process.
institutionalCancelWithdrawalBody: Digital products/services provided by Inelity are treated as instantly performed services. Therefore, withdrawal/refund rights are not available for instantly delivered digital goods.
institutionalDistanceNoticeBody: As the buyer, you acknowledge waiving withdrawal/refund rights for instantly delivered electronic services/products. Please review terms carefully before purchasing.
institutionalDistanceWithdrawalBody: Purchased products/services are evaluated under distance sales regulations. Withdrawal/refund rights are not available for instantly delivered digital goods. Completing purchase means acceptance of these terms.
institutionalPrivacyCollectedDataBody: Your IP address and user-agent data may be collected via cookies and similar technologies, through automated/non-automated methods and third-party providers when needed, and processed during the service/contract period under legitimate interest.
institutionalPrivacyCollectedDataTitle: Collected Personal Data, Collection Method, and Legal Basis
institutionalPrivacyContactBody: You are free to accept or reject processing of required personal data under this policy. Continuing to use the site implies acceptance. For detailed information, contact support@inelity.com.
institutionalPrivacyIntroController: As Inelity, acting as the data controller, this policy explains which personal data is processed, for what purposes, with whom it may be shared, legal grounds, and your rights regarding processed data.
institutionalPrivacyIntroSafety: Your security is important to us. Therefore, personal data you share with us is handled with care.
institutionalPrivacyProcessingPurposeBod: Your data is processed proportionally to deliver services, improve accessibility, develop features based on needs, comply with legal obligations, and respond to authorized judicial/administrative requests.
institutionalPrivacyRightsBody: Under applicable personal data regulations, you may request information on processing, correction, deletion, transfer recipients, objection to automated decisions, and compensation for unlawful processing damage. Contact us at support@inelity.com.
institutionalPrivacyRightsTitle: Your Rights as a Data Subject
institutionalPrivacyTransferBody: Your personal data may be transferred to domestic/foreign partners, service providers, and competent public authorities when required, provided that necessary technical and administrative safeguards are in place.
institutionalPrivacyTransferTitle: Recipients and Purpose of Personal Data Transfers
institutionalUserIntroBody: The Inelity User Agreement defines the relationship and commitments between our platform and users. Awareness of privacy and personal data protection is important to us.
institutionalUserTermsBody1: Users are expected to use Inelity services lawfully and ethically. Illegal or unethical activities are not supported.
institutionalUserTermsBody2: Account security is the user’s responsibility. Payment obligations for purchased products must also be fulfilled.
institutionalUserTermsBody3: Users must comply with applicable laws and regulations while using services. Inelity reserves the right to take action in case of violations.

productErrorDescription: The Product Could Not Be Installed Due to an Interface Problem!
productFaqCategoryFlowAnswer: Most products in this category follow an automated delivery + dashboard management flow. Any special requirements will be stated in the description.
productFaqCheckoutExtraInfoQuestion: Do I need to provide additional information?
productFaqCheckoutNoExtraInfoAnswer: No extra information is required; delivery is processed automatically after purchase.
productFaqCheckoutRequiredInfoAnswer: This product requires {{inputCount}} input field(s) during checkout. Data is used only for delivery/activation.
productFaqCheckoutRequiredInfoQuestion: What information will be requested at checkout?
productFaqClearAnswersAboutDeliveryCheck: Clear answers about delivery, checkout and support.
productFaqDeliveryHowWorksAnswerInStock: After purchase completes, delivery is handled automatically/instantly depending on product type. Instructions are shown after payment for eligible products.
productFaqDeliveryHowWorksAnswerOutOfSto: This product is currently out of stock, so delivery cannot start. Purchasing will be enabled when stock returns.
productFaqNoteTermsVaryProductType: Note: Terms may vary by product type. Review the description and policy pages before purchase.
productFaqOrderTrackingAnswer: You can track orders and disputed issues in your dashboard after purchase.
productFaqOrderTrackingQuestion: Where can I track my order?
productFaqPaymentSecurityAnswer: Yes. Payment completes securely and the system shows the next steps and instructions after purchase.
productFaqRefundCancelAnswer: Refund/cancellation terms can vary for digital products and automated delivery. Review the product description and the institutional policy pages before purchasing.
productFaqRefundCancelQuestion: Can I cancel or request a refund?
productFaqSupportAnswer: Open a support ticket from your dashboard. Including your order ID will speed up resolution.
productFaqVideoPurposeAnswer: The video shows how the product works or how delivery is completed. Watching it before purchasing is recommended.
productFaqVideoPurposeQuestion: What is the product video for?
productFooter: All information entered will be processed, it is not possible to retrieve it.
productPremiumQualityInstantDeliverySecu: Premium quality, instant delivery, and a secure purchase experience.
productPurchaseCompletesSecurely: Purchase completes securely. Product instructions are shown after payment.
